## 👨‍💻 About

Full Stack Developer with **4+ years of experience** building robust web applications using **React, Vue, and Angular**. Proficient in **Node.js, Python, and .NET**. Hands-on experience in **end-to-end project** execution, including requirements gathering, performance testing, CI/CD pipelines, proof of concept, and UX/UI optimization. Delivers high-impact solutions focused on **performance and client value**.

## 💼 Experience

### Front-end Developer (Mid-Level)
**Marttech - Desenvolvimento de Software** | Toledo, PR, Brazil (Remote)  
*July 2024 – August 2025*
- Gathered technical requirements from clients and documented system impacts.
- Prioritized tasks and organized sprints in **Azure DevOps**.
- Implemented user interfaces in **React.js** following usability guidelines.
- Built reusable components with **Material UI**.
- Optimized **MapBox** polygon and layer implementations, reducing load time by **80%** and memory usage from **6GB to 2GB**.
- Refactored parts of the application architecture, addressing performance and usability issues.

### Development Analyst (Mid-Level)
**IBrowse Consultoria e Informática** | Porto Alegre, RS, Brazil (Remote)  
*August 2023 – January 2024*
- Supported internal and external teams in handling technical demands.
- Developed and fixed features in **Angular** applications.
- Defined architecture and design patterns for the application and new modules.
- Configured **CI/CD** pipelines and managed **GitLab** repositories.
- Created unit tests using Karma with **77%** overall code coverage.
- Reviewed code and tracked deliveries in **ClickUp**, ensuring compliance with internal standards.

### Front-end Angular Web Developer
**INOVA - Polo de Inovação IFAM** | Manaus, AM, Brazil  
*March 2023 – July 2023*
- Refactored outdated **Angular** pages and components.
- Created new screens and flows to expand the application.
- Fixed critical bugs reported by end users.
- Mentored 3 students in technical activities, supervising deliveries and professional development.

### Information Technology Analyst
**ClearSale** | São Paulo, SP, Brazil (Remote)  
*January 2022 – December 2022*
- Built interfaces and components in **Vue.js**.
- Maintained and evolved features in **C#** and **jQuery**.
- Modeled and managed data in **SQL Server**.
- Documented application flows for development teams.
- Analyzed production errors and reported moderate failures.
- Developed **unit tests** to ensure code quality.

### Front-end Angular Web Developer
**INOVA - Polo de Inovação IFAM** | Manaus, AM, Brazil  
*September 2021 – March 2022*
- Refactored outdated **Angular** pages and components.
- Created new screens and flows to expand the application.
- Fixed critical bugs reported by end users.
- **Mentored 3 students** in technical activities, supervising deliveries and professional development.

### Front-end Vue.js Developer
**BeeApp** | Primavera do Leste, MT, Brazil (Remote)  
*October 2021 – December 2021*
- Built modular **Vue.js** components with **Vuetify**.
- Adapted pages for mobile devices.
- Migrated legacy **PHP** pages to **Vue.js**.
- Implemented server-side rendering with **Nuxt.js**, improving Lighthouse SEO score from **65 to 90+**.
- Modeled front-end architecture.
- Configured UI component libraries.

### Laboratory Maintenance Technician
**IFAM - Instituto Federal do Amazonas** | Coari, AM, Brazil  
*February 2018 – May 2018*
- Performed maintenance on computers, notebooks, and servers.
- Configured computer networks and **Windows/Linux operating systems.**
- Installed software for academic activities.
- Assisted in practical laboratory classes.
- Organized and maintained **IT infrastructure.**
